title: Ricoila verna
intro: I couldn't find any information about Ricoila verna. However, I found that Ricola is a brand, but it is not a plant species. However, I did find that the plant is likely Ricola's source of the plant species Thymus serpyllum,  Thymus lanuginosus or another plant source.
taxonomy: I couldn't find any information on a plant called Ricoila verna.
properties: Ricoila verna is not a known plant.
